backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the multi-tenant Hospital Management System, defining data types (Medicine, Supplier, Bed, BloodStock, UserProfile with roles) and state maps, plus helper functions for role-based access control (superAdmin, hospitalAdmin, doctor, patient).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (authentication, dashboards, RBAC) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of each component and page.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Multi-Tenant Hospital Management System' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application file that configures TanStack Router with all routes (super-admin, hospital-admin with sub-pages, doctor, patient), implements role-based navigation guards via RootGate, and wraps the app in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AlertNotificatio: Bell icon notification popover component that fetches and displays low-stock medicines, expiring medicines, and low blood group alerts for a given hospital, showing a count badge when alerts exist.
frontend/src/components/common/DataTable: Generic reusable table component with built-in client-side search, dropdown filtering, pagination, loading skeletons, and optional per-row action rendering.
Displays a single statistic with a title, value, icon, optional subtitle, and color-coded left border and icon background, with a skeleton loading state.
frontend/src/components/DarkModeToggle.t: Small button component that toggles between light and dark mode using the useDarkMode hook, displaying a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/components/dashboards/admin: Admin page for managing hospital appointments stored in localStorage, supporting creation, status updates, and filtered tabular display.
Admin page for bed management that fetches bed stats and status from the backend, and supports adding beds and toggling their availability/occupied status.
Admin page for managing blood bank inventory per hospital, displaying all blood groups with stock levels, low-stock alerts, and an edit dialog to update quantities.
Admin page for managing doctors within a hospital, storing data in localStorage with add/edit functionality via a dialog form and a searchable data table.
Admin page for managing medicine inventory, supporting add/edit/delete operations via React Query hooks with stock status indicators for expired, expiring, and low-stock items.
Admin reports page displaying tabbed views of medicines, beds, and blood stock data with PDF export functionality for each category.
Admin page for managing non-doctor hospital staff, persisting members to localStorage with role/department fields and an add dialog form.
Admin page for managing medicine suppliers, using React Query hooks to add and update supplier records displayed in a searchable data table.
frontend/src/components/dashboards/Docto: Doctor-facing dashboard that reads appointments from localStorage, displays stat cards for totals and statuses, and provides a dialog to update appointment status and add treatment notes.
frontend/src/components/dashboards/Hospi: Hospital admin home dashboard showing stat cards for medicines, low stock, bed occupancy, and blood stock alerts, plus quick-link buttons to sub-sections; renders child routes via Outlet when not on the root path.
frontend/src/components/dashboards/Patie: Patient-facing dashboard that displays bed stats, blood stock, and allows patients to view and book appointments stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/components/dashboards/Super: Super admin dashboard for creating and listing hospitals, storing entries in localStorage and optionally assigning a hospital admin principal via the backend.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Defines the main application shell with a role-based sidebar navigation, user avatar dropdown, dark mode toggle, and alert notifications, rendering child routes via an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders a simple footer with copyright year, app name, and a branded link to caffeine.ai using the current hostname as a UTM parameter.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the login page with a hero panel showcasing HMS features and a right panel with an Internet Identity sign-in button, handling loading state during authentication.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time users to set up their profile by entering a name, selecting a role, and optionally providing a hospital ID before saving via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the home page and redirects authenticated users to their role-appropriate dashboard if they lack the required role.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDarkMode.ts: Custom hook that persists and toggles dark mode by adding/removing the 'dark' class on the document root and storing the preference in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend data fetching and mutations, covering user profiles, medicines, suppliers, beds, and blood stock operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a teal/green medical theme with full light/dark mode CSS custom properties and utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting helpers for class merging, timestamp formatting/expiry checks, nanosecond conversion, blood group labeling, and principal truncation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/pdfExport.ts: Provides a utility function `exportToPDF` that generates a styled HTML table from report data and opens a print dialog in a new browser window to produce a PDF.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom colors (using OKLCH variables), typography, border radius, box shadows, animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for a multi-tenant Hospital Management System, including architecture notes, implemented features, known issues, and image requirements.
